name: interview
description: Interview invitations, scheduling links, confirmations, reschedules, or follow-ups tied to a specific job interview.

name: recruiter
description: Outreach from recruiters, hiring managers, or staffing agencies about a potential role, before an interview is scheduled.

name: update
description: Notifications, receipts, shipping/order updates, account or service updates, statements, or alerts from companies and platforms.

name: personal
description: Personal correspondence from a person you know (friends, family, landlord, doctor, etc.), not an automated or business notification.

name: promotion
description: Marketing emails, promotional offers, newsletters, or other low-priority noise not requiring a response.
